items.title: Michael Asher Digs Deep
items.summary: A survey of the artist who made museums his medium, the godmothers of ecosexuality, and more.

items.title: For Michael Asher, the Museum Was the Medium
items.summary: A survey of the conceptual artist reveals his deep engagement with institutional machinations, though it sometimes feels like inside baseball.

items.title: Meet the Doyennes of Ecosexuality
items.summary: In their latest film, Annie Sprinkle and Beth Stephens advocate replacing an exploitative relationship with the Earth with one based on intimacy, care, and pleasure.

items.title: Mural Damaged in Break-In at Harriet Tubman Museum
items.summary: The recently renovated Maryland museum also said its donation box was taken in last weekend’s burglary.
